title: Do a Minecart Roll
description: Client–side immersive minecart camera banking, smoothing and subtle kinetic feedback.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ayyAh3ECJ4I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># Do a Minecart Roll

Make minecart rides feel smoother, faster and more immersive.

**Do a Minecart Roll** is a client-side Fabric mod that improves the first-person minecart camera. When your minecart takes a curve, the camera gently banks into the turn. At higher speed, the movement becomes more noticeable, while the smoothing keeps sharp rail corners from feeling too stiff.

The mod also adds subtle kinetic feedback while riding and a cleaner airborne feel when a minecart jumps or briefly leaves the rail.

## Features

- First-person camera banking in minecart curves
- Smooth interpolation for sharp direction changes
- Minimal speed vibration without heavy screen shake
- Softer airborne camera movement
- Works on servers without server-side installation

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21.10 and 1.21.11
- Fabric
- Client-side only
- Requires Java 21

## Notes

This mod does not change minecart physics, speed, rails or server behavior. It is purely visual.

## Credits

Created by **RacoonMC**. and helpt by AI
